Footer.tagline: Watch together, decide faster. Social movie & TV recommendations from friends you trust.

Landing.description: Vover connects you and your friends around movies and TV. Share what you love, discover what they're watching, and always know what to put on next.
Landing.signInToSave: Sign in to save to your watchlist →
Landing.featuresSubtitle: Vover brings your social circle into your movie-watching life — with the tools you actually need.
Landing.feature1Desc: Picks from people who know your taste — not a faceless algorithm.
Landing.feature2Desc: Save everything. Organize, prioritize, and never forget a title again.
Landing.feature3Desc: See what your friends are watching, with their ratings and notes.
Landing.feature4Desc: Found something amazing? Send it to a friend in two taps.
Landing.feature5Desc: Track movies watched, hours spent, and your rating patterns.
Landing.feature6Desc: Streaming availability, trailers, and cast info on every title page.
Landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Three steps to better movie nights
Landing.step1Desc: Search millions of movies and TV shows. Add them to your watchlist instantly.
Landing.step2Desc: Add your friends. See what they're watching and what they'd recommend.
Landing.step3Desc: Send and receive picks. Agree on what to watch next in seconds.
Landing.testimonial1Text: Finally stopped arguing about what to watch. Vover solved movie night.
Landing.testimonial2Text: My friends' recommendations beat Netflix's suggestions every single time.
Landing.testimonial3Text: Love seeing what my friends are watching. Always find something great.
Landing.ctaSubtitle: Join Vover for free. Sign in with a magic link — no password required.

Home.mood: What are you in the mood for tonight?
Home.watchlistEmptyHint: Browse trending titles below and start saving
Home.allSetUpHint: Click any title above to add it to your watchlist or mark it as watched.
